# libwebp

Pinned to libwebp 1.6.0 from the official release archive.

Archive SHA-256:
`e4ab7009bf0629fd11982d4c2aa83964cf244cffba7347ecd39019a9e38c4564`.

Only the decoder, decoder DSP, decoder utility, and public header directories
are vendored and compiled. Encoders, muxers, demuxers, tools, examples, and
animation utilities are excluded. See `COPYING` and `PATENTS`.
